workflow.name: Process invoices and send weekly AI reports with OpenAI and Gmail
workflow.description:
## Overview
This workflow automates invoice handling from upload to reporting using AI.

Users submit invoices through a simple form. The workflow extracts key details, validates the data, stores valid invoices, and sends email notifications. It also generates a weekly summary report automatically.

This helps reduce manual data entry and ensures consistent invoice processing.

---

## How It Works

1. **Form Submission**
   Users upload an invoice (PDF or image) along with their email.

2. **Initial Storage**
   The raw submission is stored for tracking and reference.

3. **Text Extraction**
   The uploaded file is processed to extract text content.

4. **AI Data Extraction**
   AI converts the raw text into structured invoice data such as invoice number, vendor, date, currency, and totals.

5. **Validation**
   The workflow checks:
   - Date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
   - Allowed currencies
   - Total amount validity

6. **Conditional Flow**
   - If valid → invoice is stored and a success email is sent  
   - If invalid → an error email is sent with details

7. **Weekly Reporting**
   A scheduled trigger runs weekly to:
   - Fetch all validated invoices
   - Generate a summary report using AI
   - Send the report via email

---

## Setup Instructions

1. Add your OpenAI credentials (used for data extraction and reporting)
2. Connect Gmail credentials for sending emails
3. Configure Data Tables:
   - `invoice_form_submissions`
   - `validated_invoices`
4. Update the **Workflow Configuration** node:
   - Set report recipient email
   - Adjust allowed currencies if needed
5. Ensure the file field (`invoiceFile`) is correctly mapped
6. Test with a sample invoice
7. Activate the workflow

---

## Use Cases

- Automating invoice processing for small businesses
- Reducing manual accounting data entry
- Validating invoices before storing them
- Generating weekly financial summaries
- Handling invoice submissions from clients or teams

---

## Requirements

- OpenAI API credentials
- Gmail account (for sending emails)
- n8n Data Tables (or replace with your preferred database)
- n8n instance with file upload support

---

## Notes

- Make sure to fix the IF condition:
  Use `{{$json.validation.isValid}}` instead of accessing `isValid` directly.

- You can extend validation rules in the Code node based on your business needs.

- The reporting section can be customized to include more insights or formats.

values.formSubmittedText: Thank you! Your invoice is being processed. You will receive an email confirmation shortly.

parameters.formDescription: Upload your invoice (PDF or image) for automated processing and validation

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert invoice data extraction assistant. Extract all relevant information from the provided invoice text and return it in the structured format.

Extract the following fields:
- Invoice number
- Invoice date (format as YYYY-MM-DD)
- Vendor/supplier name
- Currency (3-letter ISO code like USD, EUR, GBP)
- Total amount (numeric value only)
- Subtotal (numeric value only)
- Tax amount (numeric value only)
- Line items with description, quantity, unit price, and amount

Be precise with numbers and dates. If a field is not found, use null.

assignments.name: emailBody
assignments.value:
=

Invoice Processed Successfully

Your invoice has been successfully processed and validated.

Invoice Details:

  • Invoice Number: {{ $json.invoiceNumber }}
  • Vendor: {{ $json.vendorName }}
  • Date: {{ $json.invoiceDate }}
  • Total Amount: ${{ $json.totalAmount }}

The invoice has been stored in the system and is ready for further processing.

assignments.name: emailBody
assignments.value:
=

Invoice Validation Failed

The uploaded invoice could not be processed due to the following validation errors:

Validation Errors:
    {{ $json.validationErrors ? $json.validationErrors.map(error => '
  • ' + error + '
    • ').join('') : '
  • Unknown validation error
    • ' }}

Invoice Details:

  • Submission Time: {{ $json.submissionTime || 'N/A' }}
  • File Name: {{ $json.fileName || 'N/A' }}

Please review the invoice and resubmit with the correct information.

options.systemMessage:
You are a financial reporting assistant. Generate a comprehensive weekly spending report based on the provided invoice data.

Your report should include:
1. Executive Summary: Total spending for the week, number of invoices processed
2. Spending by Vendor: Break down spending by vendor name
3. Spending by Currency: Show totals in each currency
4. Top 5 Largest Invoices: List the highest value invoices with details
5. Trends and Insights: Any notable patterns or observations

Format the report in clean HTML with proper headings, tables, and styling. Make it professional and easy to read.

parameters.content:
## How it works
This workflow helps you automatically process invoices using AI.

A user uploads an invoice file (PDF or image) through a form. The file is read and the text is extracted. Then AI pulls out important details like invoice number, vendor name, date, currency, and total amount.

After that, the data is checked to make sure it looks correct. For example, it verifies the date format, allowed currencies, and that the total amount is valid.

If everything is correct, the invoice is saved and a confirmation email is sent to the user. If something is wrong, the user receives an email with the issues so they can fix and resend the invoice.

The workflow also runs weekly. It collects all processed invoices and creates a simple summary report using AI, which is sent by email.

## Setup steps
1. Add your OpenAI credentials
2. Connect Gmail for sending emails
3. Set up Data Tables for storing invoices
4. Add your report email in the config node
5. Test with a sample invoice
6. Turn on the workflow

## Form Input
Collects user email and invoice file via form trigger.

## Configuration and Submission Storage
Defines report email and valid currencies used in validation. and 
Stores raw form data for tracking and auditing purposes.

## File Extraction
Extracts text content from uploaded invoice files.

## AI Processing
AI converts extracted text into structured invoice data.

## Validation
Checks date format, currency, and total amount accuracy.

## Success Path
Stores valid invoices and sends confirmation email.

## Error Path
Sends email with validation errors for correction.

## Weekly Trigger
Runs weekly to process stored invoices for reporting.

## Report Generation
AI generates a formatted weekly invoice summary report.

## Report Email
Sends weekly report to configured recipient.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
